message:
## 🏆 New King of Distil SN97!

**UID 21** has dethroned **UID 194**

📊 **KL: 0.050146** (previous king scored 0.048793 last eval)
🤗 Model: [rlinprogress/sn97-distilled-V2](<https://huggingface.co/rlinprogress/sn97-distilled-V2>)
👑 Previous king: [iotaminer/distil-qwen35-4b](<https://huggingface.co/iotaminer/distil-qwen35-4b>)

💰 **Winner earns ~174.8 τ/day ($54,449/day)** — winner takes all!

Think you can beat **0.049645 KL** (1% epsilon)? Check the [mining guide](<https://github.com/unarbos/distil#mining-guide>) to get started.
